symbols.doc: A stdio MCP server spawned as a subprocess (no ports, no network).
symbols.name: StdioServer
symbols.signature: (command: 'str', args: 'list[str]', env: 'dict[str, str] | None' = None) -> None

symbols.doc: A streamable-http MCP server. Per-run identity rides as a bearer
symbols.name: HttpServer

symbols.doc: Build the ``{name: async factory}`` dict for ``compile(tool_factories=...)``.
symbols.name: mcp_tool_factories
symbols.signature: (servers: 'dict[str, StdioServer | HttpServer]', *, token_provider: 'TokenProvider | None' = None, namespace: 'bool' = True, stdio_token_arg: 'str' = 'token') -> 'dict[str, ToolFactory]'

symbols.doc: Build ONE lazy async factory for a SINGLE known tool — no build-time connect.
symbols.name: mcp_tool_factory
symbols.signature: (server_key: 'str', spec: 'StdioServer | HttpServer', *, tool_name: 'str', rename_to: 'str | None' = None, token_provider: 'TokenProvider | None' = None, stdio_token_arg: 'str' = 'token') -> 'ToolFactory'

symbols.name: mcp_resource_fetcher
symbols.signature: (servers: 'dict[str, StdioServer | HttpServer]', *, token_provider: 'TokenProvider | None' = None) -> 'tuple[Callable[[str], Awaitable[tuple[Any, str | None]]], Callable[[str, dict], Awaitable[Any]]]'
